payload.title: What is Statewave?
payload.text: Statewave is a self-hosted memory runtime for AI agents. It stores episodes, compiles them into memories, and exposes a /v1/context retrieval endpoint that lets an LLM recall relevant facts about a subject across sessions.

payload.title: Storage
payload.text: Statewave uses PostgreSQL with the pgvector extension for both relational episode storage and vector similarity search over compiled memories.

payload.title: Compilation
payload.text: Episodes are compiled into typed memories (facts, procedures, summaries). Heuristic compilation is the default; LLM compilation is opt-in via STATEWAVE_COMPILER_TYPE=llm.
